zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibylle de Wavrin於1240年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德時，她的父親Robert II de Wavrin27歲，母親Eustachie de Châtillon30歲。她於1259年與Hughes D'Antoing Epinoy在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦福林結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1284年享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibylle de Wavrin于1240年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德时，她的父亲Robert II de Wavrin27岁，母亲Eustachie de Châtillon30岁。她于1259年与Hughes D'Antoing Epinoy在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦福林结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1284年享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wavrin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

nameMeanings.name: Sibylle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philippe, Alain, Etienne, Jean-Michael.
French: from the female personal name Sibille, from Greek Sibylla (see Sibley ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sibylle de Wavrin was born in 1240, in Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Robert II de Wavrin, was 27 and her mother, Eustachie de Châtillon, was 30. She married Hughes D'Antoing Epinoy in 1259, in Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1284, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibylle de Wavrin est née en 1240, à Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Robert II de Wavrin, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Eustachie de Châtillon, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Hughes D'Antoing Epinoy en 1259, à Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1284, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibylle de Wavrin 1240 in Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert II de Wavrin 27 und ihre Mutter Eustachie de Châtillon 30. Sie hat 1259 in Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich Hughes D'Antoing Epinoy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1284 im Alter von 44 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibylle de Wavrin è nata il nel 1240 nel Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Robert II de Wavrin, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Eustachie de Châtillon, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Hughes D'Antoing Epinoy nel 1259, nel Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1284, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibylle de Wavrinが1240年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードで生まれた時，父Robert II de Wavrinは27歳，母Eustachie de Châtillonは30歳であった。1259年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードワvリンでHughes D'Antoing Epinoyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1284年に44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibylle de Wavrin(이)가 1240년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert II de Wavrin(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eustachie de Châtillon(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1259년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 와브린에서 Hughes D'Antoing Epinoy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1284년 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibylle de Wavrin nasceu em 1240, em Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Robert II de Wavrin, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Eustachie de Châtillon, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Hughes D'Antoing Epinoy em 1259, em Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1284, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibylle de Wavrin родилась в 1240 г. в местности норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert II de Wavrin было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Eustachie de Châtillon, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hughes D'Antoing Epinoy в 1259 г. в местности ваврин, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1284 г. в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sibylle de Wavrin nació en 1240, en Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Robert II de Wavrin, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Eustachie de Châtillon, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Hughes D'Antoing Epinoy en 1259, en Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1284, a la edad de 44 años.
